title: Grupo Toysal and CycleÃ¸ announce New Biomethane Plant in Galicia, Spain
content:
Grupo Toysal, a leader in industrial waste management, and CycleÃ˜, a key player in biomethane plant development, have successfully partnered to launch an innovative new biomethane facility in PorriÃ±o, Galicia. The project, named Ecogalia, leverages Toysalâ€™s infrastructure for waste collection to manage up to 22,000 tonnes of organic waste annually. Using CycleÃ˜â€™s proprietary technology, the plant will purify the biogas to produce 45 GWh of biomethane per year, which is equivalent to 6.6 million cubic metres, and prevent approximately 6,000 tonnes of CO2 emissions.

The biomethane generated will be injected directly into the national gas grid, playing a crucial role in the decarbonization of hard-to-abate sectors and contributing to Spainâ€™s national goal of increasing biomethane production to 20 TWh by 2030. The Ecogalia plant is expected to boost local activity, create new jobs, and optimize waste treatment by integrating it into the circular economy. This project is CycleÃ˜'s second milestone in producing biomethane from industrial waste. The leaders of both companies emphasized that the plant is the result of a close collaboration built on shared values of sustainability, innovation, and a mutual goal to create value from waste.
author: Analysts Account
